title: stephanandra incisa f. quadrifissa
intro: Stephanandra incisa f. quadrifissa, also known as quadrifid Stephanandra, is a type of flowering plant in the family Rhamnaceae, native to East Asia. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stephanandra incisa f. quadrifissa are thought to include reducing fever, alleviating diarrhea, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
